current.summary: Brainstorming vouch mechanism: spec vs syllago vs community ownership, artifact vs people trust dimensions

activeWork.description: Exploring whether vouch/trust mechanism belongs in spec, syllago, or community ownership; planning multi-agent brainstorm on implementations, gaps, and design space (artifact vs people trust balance)
activeWork.progress: Key question identified: unclear boundary between spec, syllago tooling, and community ownership for vouch mechanism. Planning 4 agent brainstorms to explore: different vouch implementations, identify gaps, design space exploration, and other considerations not yet captured.

git.lastCommit: 79c3c85 docs: add design plans, research, provider docs, and spec updates

recentDecisions: Vouch mechanism needs exploration of spec vs syllago vs community boundary
Focus on both artifact trust and people trust dimensions
Use multi-agent brainstorm to explore implementation options
nextSteps: Run 4 agent brainstorms on vouch mechanism (implementations, gaps, design space, other considerations)

context.notes: Critical decision point: where does vouch belong? Spec (Agent Ecosystem), syllago tooling, or community-owned registry? Need to explore multiple implementation approaches and understand whether to balance artifact-focused trust vs people-focused trust equally or favor one. Agents should brainstorm: (1) Different vouch implementations, (2) Gaps in each approach, (3) Design space exploration, (4) Other considerations/unknowns
